text.tspan: OOM Invariant: Only processes within the specific cgroup hierarchy are considered for termination.
Host-level processes are strictly excluded from selection. Selection scope is restricted to tasks linked via mem_cgroup structure.

g.text: Linux Kernel memcg OOM Logic Flow

ul.li: OOM Score: Normalized usage against memcg limit (not node limit).
oom_score_adj: Respected within cgroup tree scope.
memory.oom_group: If set to 1, the kernel kills all tasks within the cgroup to ensure consistent state.
Isolation: The selector uses mem_cgroup_iter to ensure zero visibility of tasks in sibling or parent cgroups.
Priority: Processes with oom_score_adj = -1000 are OOM-disabled and skipped.

g.title: Triggered by kmalloc() or User-space Page Fault
Triggered by kmalloc() or User-space Page Fault
